OmniIntegrationProcedure.name: FindSameHpfsbyPnc

omniProcessElements.name: AllPncs
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "AccountIds" : "%FindTargetHpfAccounts:Healthcare_Practitioner_Facility__r:AccountId%", "contractId" : "%contractId%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "Pncs", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "GetMatchingPncsByHpfs", "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ ], "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "ignoreCache" : false, "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperTurboAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: CopyRates
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "ISNOTBLANK(%SourcePncs%) && ISNOTBLANK(%TargetPncs%)", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "SourcePnc" : "%SourcePncs%", "TargetPnc" : "%TargetPncs%", "contractId" : "%contractId%", "startDate" : "%startDate%", "endDate" : "%endDate%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "integrationProcedureKey" : "Clinician_CloneCpaAndPcaByPnc", "remoteOptions" : { }, "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "disableChainable" : false, "show" : null, "label" : "IntegrationProcedureAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }
